name: bev-system
description: BeV EV Reference Program with VGK ID System

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && python app/main.py & cd frontend && npm run dev -- --port 5000 --hostname 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev: cd backend && python app/main.py & cd frontend && npm run dev -- --port 5000 --hostname 0.0.0.0
